steps.title: Identify the constraint on daily weight gain
steps.content:
The elephant gains more than 2 but less than 3 pounds per day. In inequality form:
$$2 < \text{daily gain} < 3$$

steps.title: Find the range of total weight gain over 365 days
steps.content:
Multiply all parts by 365 to find the range of total weight gained over 365 days:
$$2 \times 365 < \text{daily gain} \times 365 < 3 \times 365$$
$$730 < \text{total gain} < 1,095$$

steps.title: Calculate the final weight w
steps.content:
The final weight equals initial weight plus total gain. Since $730 < \text{total gain} < 1,095$, add 200 to all parts:
$$200 + 730 < w < 200 + 1,095$$
$$930 < w < 1,295$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
